title: Rainberg Folding Ironing Board, 122 x 38cm Ironing Surface, Adjustable Height Up To (78-91cm), Includes Silicone Iron Rest, Durable with Safety Lock & Anti-Skid Feet, Foldable Ironing Boards (Black)
features: HEAT RESISTANT IRON BOARD: The full-size pad of the ironing board is made from high-quality materials to ensure it can withstand the heat and pressure of regular ironing. With a smooth and flat surface, the wide and long pad of the iron board provides a perfect platform for all your ironing needs.

HEIGHT ADJUSTABLE:- Rainberg ironing board personalize your ironing experience across seven adjustable heights, from 27 to 34 inches. Each level boasts a secure slot lock, which is also a lock to prevent the ironing board from collapsing accidentally. The ironing table can be raised from 78-91 cm high, and you can sit on the sofa to iron.
EASY STORAGE, ANYWHERE:- Our iron board is compact, lightweight, and perfect for any space. Easily store it in your bedroom closet, laundry room, or dorm.
NON-SLIP FEET: There are 4 Leg Design protective non-slip caps, so there is no need to worry about any slipping or scratching when you are ironing.

COTTON COVER: The lightweight iron table comes with a high-quality 100% cotton cover with a form pad 5mm sponge padding cover, offering a smooth and heat-resistant surface for effective ironing. The cover was easy to maintain and was used for a long time.
DIMENSIONS:- 41cm wide x 7cm deep x 148cm high.Opened Dimensions excl. iron rest 122 cm long x 38 cm wide x 78-91 cm high.
Your satisfaction is our priority. If you encounter any issues, please don't hesitate to reach out. We are committed to providing prompt and effective solutions to ensure your contentment.
